home.title: Stay Connected Globally
home.subtitle: Redeem your eSIM voucher instantly and enjoy high-speed internet wherever you travel.

step1.title: Enter Code
step1.desc: Input the booking code from your confirmation email.

step2.title: Verify Details
step2.desc: Check your eSIM plan and select how many to redeem.

step3.title: Get Connected
step3.desc: Scan the QR code and activate your eSIM immediately.

redeem.title: Redeem Your Voucher
redeem.subtitle: Enter your booking code to claim your eSIMs.

success.title: Redemption Successful!
success.desc: Scan the QR code below to install your eSIM.
success.email_sent: A backup copy has also been sent to:

errors.not_found: We couldn't find a booking with this code. Please double-check or contact our hotline.
errors.expired: This voucher has expired. Please contact our hotline for assistance.
errors.fully_redeemed: This voucher has already been fully redeemed.
errors.api_error: An error occurred while communicating with the server. Please try again later.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts, please try again later.

step1.title: Find your booking email
step1.description: Use the booking code from your confirmation email to locate your purchase.

step2.title: Verify your booking details
step2.description: Review traveler info and remaining eSIM quantity before redeeming.

step3.title: Choose how many eSIMs to redeem
step3.description: Redeem only what you need now and keep unused eSIMs for later activation.

step4.title: Confirm delivery email
step4.description: We send QR codes to your email so each device can install the eSIM quickly.

step5.title: Install and activate on your phone
step5.description: Scan the QR code on the destination device and complete activation steps.

redeem.tip: Pro tip: Redeem while connected to stable internet, then install the QR code directly on the device you plan to use.

other.title: Other Devices
other.model1: Many Oppo, Huawei, and Motorola models support eSIM

iphone.title: iPhone
iphone.steps: Settings → Cellular → Add eSIM → Use QR Code.

android.title: Android
android.steps: Settings → Network & Internet → SIMs → Add eSIM → Scan QR Code.

activate.roaming_note: Turn on Data Roaming for the new eSIM profile after arriving at your destination.

q1.question: When should I redeem my eSIM?
q1.answer: Redeem any time before your trip. Install and activate when you are ready to use mobile data.

q2.question: Can I redeem only part of my order?
q2.answer: Yes. If your booking has multiple eSIMs, you can redeem only the quantity you need now.

q3.question: What happens if my booking is already fully redeemed?
q3.answer: The page will show a fully redeemed state and let you return to start another lookup.

q4.question: I did not receive the QR email. What should I do?
q4.answer: Check spam/junk folders first, then retry with the correct email address.
